sources.name: InfSein FFXIV datamining mixed
sources.notes: SaintCoinach client-data extraction used for FashionCheck and Item row IDs, localized names, icons, dye counts, and official equipment slots. The repository does not declare a license.

sources.name: 游玩c哩酱
sources.notes: 游玩c哩酱维护的国服历史、标签和答案表达式。本地证据提取不保留请求或会话元数据。

sources.name: AvantGarde
sources.notes: Plugin implementation and scoring research reference. Code is not vendored into this project.

sources.name: AvantGarde public data tracker
sources.notes: Public category-to-Item tracker. The sheet credits Kaiyoko Star for a significant portion of the research. Standalone data redistribution terms are not declared.

sources.name: Kaiyoko Star Reddit
sources.notes: Primary weekly infographic profile. Automated JSON access returned 403/429 during research, so it is registry-only unless a specific public post is reviewed.

sources.name: Kaiyoko Star X
sources.notes: Weekly infographic profile retained as a current-week reference; no bulk historical import is performed.

sources.name: Gottesstrafe Reddit
sources.notes: Active weekly results/full-details poster observed in current English community sources. Reviewed results posts may support local lower-tier candidate records; profile-level data remains registry-only until a specific post is reviewed.

sources.name: AllGameStaff Fashion Report Guide (English)
sources.notes: Mutable current-week article containing 80/100 suggestions, dyes, and accepted-item lists; WordPress revisions are not publicly readable.

sources.name: AllGameStaff Fashion Report Guide (Italian)
sources.notes: Italian companion to the mutable current-week guide; useful for comparison, not a stable historical API.

sources.name: Shapes Fashion Report AI
sources.notes: Related presentation tool with no exposed stable upstream dataset; never used as answer evidence.

sources.name: FFXIV-Fashion-check-Tool
sources.notes: Traditional Chinese weekly dataset used to verify issue/slot alignment. The repository declares no license.

sources.name: ffxiv-fashion-report
sources.notes: Historical English week/theme/hint dataset used to verify old CN translations from global week 48 onward. The repository declares no license.

sources.name: FFXIVFashionReport
sources.notes: Desktop tool implementation reference; it is not used as canonical history or category-to-Item evidence.
